string.text: A note containing secret recipes for artefact transmutation, which, probably, were written by an experienced stalker or a scientist. Hold extreme value to any stalker out there.
A note containing secret recipes for artefact transmutation, which, probably, were written by an experienced stalker or a scientist. Hold extreme value to any stalker out there.
A note containing secret recipes for artefact transmutation, which, probably, were written by an experienced stalker or a scientist. Hold extreme value to any stalker out there.
A note containing secret recipes for artefact transmutation, which, probably, were written by an experienced stalker or a scientist. Hold extreme value to any stalker out there.

A note containing secret recipes for artefact transmutation, which, probably, were written by an experienced stalker or a scientist. Hold extreme value to any stalker out there. 

 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_green] -> %c[ui_gray_2] informative
 %c[d_blue] -> %c[ui_gray_2] craft recipe
 %c[d_blue] -> %c[ui_gray_2] valuable

The original anomalous tools were once forgotten by their owner and were doomed to rot in a random anomaly since. But an incredible twist of fate decided to give them another chance: after being found and heavily modified by scientists they were able to harness the power of artefacts as of being an artefact itself. The extreme value of the kit was the reason of the attempt to bring it outside of the zone, which failed due to a sudden discovery: the tools work only inside the perimeter. After this failure it was decided to split the kit into multiple parts. These tools hold a part of that predecessor.
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_purple] -> %c[ui_gray_2] usable on mechanic's workshop for crafting
 %c[d_blue] -> %c[ui_gray_2] high quality
 %c[d_blue] -> %c[ui_gray_2] valuable
 %c[d_red] -> %c[ui_gray_2] requires suitable materials
